summary: Full frontend validation testing for CrewBook SaaS. All 17+ validation scenarios tested across Login, Register, Create Gig, GigBoard Post Gig, Profile Edit, and GigDetail Invite forms. All validations PASS. One critical seed data bug found (subscription_expires_at not set), workaround applied via admin API.

login_form.invalid_email: PASS - 'Enter a valid email address' shown

register_form.invalid_phone_9digit: PASS - 'Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number' shown
register_form.short_password: PASS - 'Password must be at least 8 characters' shown
register_form.password_no_number: PASS - 'Password must contain at least one number' shown

create_gig_dialog.past_session_date: PASS - 'Date cannot be in the past' shown on submit
create_gig_dialog.end_before_start: PASS - 'End time must be after start time' shown on submit
create_gig_dialog.empty_location: PASS - 'Location is required' shown on submit

gigboard_post_public_gig.empty_title_on_next: PASS - 'Gig title is required' shown on Next click
gigboard_post_public_gig.past_date: PASS - 'Date cannot be in the past' shown on Next click

profile_edit.invalid_instagram_url: PASS - 'Enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)' shown on Tab blur
profile_edit.invalid_upi: PASS - 'Invalid UPI ID (e.g. name@upi or 9876543210@ybl)' shown on Tab blur
profile_edit.negative_day_rate: PASS - 'Primary day rate must be a positive number' shown on Tab blur

gig_detail_invite_form.no_freelancer_selected: PASS - 'Please select a freelancer' shown on submit
gig_detail_invite_form.fee_zero: PASS - 'Proposed fee must be a positive number' shown on submit

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG: /app/backend/routers/seed.py does not set subscription_expires_at when creating seed users with subscription_plan='premium' or 'base'. PlanGate component checks `user?.subscription_plan && user?.subscription_expires_at && new Date(subscription_expires_at) > new Date()`. Since subscription_expires_at is null/undefined in seeded users, ALL gated pages (/gigs, /gig-board, /gigs/:id) are blocked for seed users in fresh environments. Fix: add `subscription_expires_at: (datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat()` to seed user documents for users with subscription_plan != 'none'. Workaround applied for this test run via admin API: assigned Premium Plan to arjun.kapoor@crewbook.in with 30-day expiry.

NOTE: Session validations in Create Gig (past date, end-before-start, empty location) only trigger via submit button, not on individual field blur in the initial test. After submit, blur events persist the error state. This is acceptable UX behavior (errors shown on submit, then persist).
action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Add subscription_expires_at to seed users in /app/backend/routers/seed.py for users with subscription_plan != 'none' - all gated pages blocked for seeded users in fresh environments
seed_data_creation: Used admin API to assign Premium Plan with 365-day expiry to arjun.kapoor@crewbook.in (user ID: 5c8a8dfa-e8ce-4eff-a093-5d077ac66c30) and Base Plan to priya.sharma@crewbook.in and kavya.nair@crewbook.in
context_for_next_testing_agent: All form validations (Login, Register, Create Gig dialog, GigBoard Post Public Gig, Profile Edit, GigDetail Invite) are working correctly. The PlanGate subscription_expires_at seed bug has been reported. Arjun Kapoor's account has an active plan with expiry 2026-04-29. All validation errors use FieldError component (p.text-xs.text-red-500) and are inline below their respective fields.

rca_of_seed_issue.bug: PlanGate blocks all seeded users from /gigs, /gig-board, /gigs/:id in fresh environments
rca_of_seed_issue.root_cause: seed.py creates users with subscription_plan='premium' but does NOT set subscription_expires_at. PlanGate checks: user?.subscription_plan && user?.subscription_expires_at && new Date(subscription_expires_at) > new Date(). Without subscription_expires_at, this evaluates to false and shows 'Subscription Required'.
rca_of_seed_issue.reproduction: Fresh seed + login as arjun.kapoor@crewbook.in + navigate to /gigs => 'Subscription Required' shown
rca_of_seed_issue.fix: In seed.py lead/freelancer user document creation, add: subscription_expires_at=(datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat() when subscription_plan != 'none'
